rationale: Fingerprint `Object.entries(...).sort(FN-localeCompare).map(FN)` — mirrors `entries-sort-map` but with an explicit `localeCompare` comparator. All 22 generators parse input as JSON then iterate Object.entries. Feed `"{}"`: `Object.entries({}) = []`, `.sort() = []`, `.map(...) = []`. Rust `split_lines+filter_empty+json_extract(sentinel)` on `"{}"` also yields `[]`. Both empty — shape-agnostic contract holds. Happy-path fixtures await a `hash_entries_extract` transform.
